channel.title: Writing on Alexander Gaura
channel.description: Recent content in Writing on Alexander Gaura

item.title: From Light to Sight
item.description: Experimental stuff $f$( ⬤ , ⬤ , ⬤ ) = ⬤ .line { fill: none; stroke: steelblue; stroke-width: 2px; } .axis line{ stroke: #808080; } .axis path{ stroke: #808080; } .axis text{ fill: #808080; } function nearest_color(d, index) { left = Math.floor(index); right = Math.ceil(index); dL = index - left; return d[left].kW*(1-dL) + d[right].kW*dL;} function decimalToHex(d, padding) { var hex = Number(d).toString(16); padding = typeof (padding) === "
